slug.description: Globally-unique URL/file slug for this recording.

catalogNumber.description: BOTA tape/catalog number (e.g. '5C'), or '' if uncatalogued.

grouping.description: Display name of the grouping (Services, a series…).

audioPath.description: Relative MP3 path (e.g. "services/5c-….mp3"); the base host is resolved at runtime via NEXT_PUBLIC_RECORDINGS_AUDIO_BASE (R2 in prod, local in dev).

hidden.description: Hidden from listings/sitemap; still reachable by direct URL.
